allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in @\('git','npm','node','python','python3'\)\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$c -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.git $tmp; if \($?\) { "CLONED OK"; Get-ChildItem "$tmp\\.claude\\skills" | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($s = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max"; Get-ChildItem $s | Select-Object Mode,Name; "--- has SKILL.md:"; Test-Path "$s\\SKILL.md"; "--- scripts:"; if \(Test-Path "$s\\scripts"\) { Get-ChildItem "$s\\scripts" -Recurse -File | Select-Object -First 20 FullName } else { "no scripts dir" }; "--- size MB:"; [math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem $s -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB,2\))

PowerShell($s = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max"; "=== scripts ==="; Get-ChildItem "$s\\scripts" -Recurse | Select-Object Name; "=== data \(top\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "$s\\data" | Select-Object Mode,Name; "=== all skills sizes ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone\\.claude\\skills" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $sz=[math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB,2\); "$\($_.Name\): $sz MB" })

PowerShell($skills = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone\\.claude\\skills"; Get-ChildItem $skills -Directory | ForEach-Object { $f="$\($_.FullName\)\\SKILL.md"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $fm = \(Get-Content $f -TotalCount 6\) -join " | "; "[$\($_.Name\)] $fm" } else { "[$\($_.Name\)] NO SKILL.md" } }; "=== destination ==="; $dest="$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"; "dest: $dest"; "exists: $\(Test-Path $dest\)"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Get-ChildItem $dest -Directory | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($src = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\uipro-clone\\.claude\\skills"; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem $src -Directory | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination "$dest\\$\($_.Name\)" -Recurse -Force }; "=== installed ==="; Get-ChildItem $dest -Directory | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) - SKILL.md: $\(Test-Path "$\($_.FullName\)\\SKILL.md"\)" })

PowerShell($found=$false; foreach \($c in @\('py','python3'\)\) { $cmd=Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($cmd\){ try { $v = & $c --version 2>&1; if\($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\){ "$c OK -> $v \($\($cmd.Source\)\)"; $found=$true } else { "$c -> stub/alias" } } catch { "$c -> error" } } else { "$c -> not found" } }; "py launcher list:"; try { py -0p 2>&1 } catch { "no py launcher" })

PowerShell($p = Join-Path \([System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath\($env:TEMP\)\) "claude\\uipro-clone"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.Attributes = 'Normal' }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $p; "removed" } else { "gone" }; "exists now: $\(Test-Path $p\)")
Bash(python scripts/search.py "osteopath wellness therapist premium natural sage" --design-system -p "Manon Fajjari Osteopathe")

PowerShell(Write-Output "--- node ---"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node --version 2>$null; Write-Output "--- npm ---"; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- gh ---"; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- vercel ---"; \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- git user ---"; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Site vitrine Manon Fajjari — ostéopathe D.O. \(multipage, SEO, Doctolib\) *)
